description: Blockchain data: token distribution, delegations, and treasury transactions
notes: Data collected via Etherscan REST API (free tier)

delegations.json.description: ENS token DelegateChanged events from Etherscan

provenance.notes: token_balance is null; silver layer handles via try_cast

token_distribution.json.description: ENS token holder balances computed from Transfer events

provenance.query_or_method: getLogs (topic0=Transfer, contract=ENS token), balance computed client-side
provenance.covers_period: cumulative from token deployment to latest block
provenance.notes: Balances computed as sum(inflows) - sum(outflows) per address

treasury_flows.json.description: ENS DAO treasury transactions (ETH + ERC-20 transfers)

provenance.query_or_method: account/txlist + account/tokentx for DAO wallet addresses
provenance.notes: Category set to unknown; can be enriched from SafeNotes
